testDetail.emptyQuestions: This test has no questions yet.

deleteDialog.title: Delete test?

header.descEdit: Update the content. Learners' existing answers are not affected.
header.descFinal: Once created, it will be automatically linked as the final test of the selected course.
header.descNew: This test can be used as a mid-module or final test. Attach it to a course after creating it.

existingFinalDialog.body: Each course has only one final test. Do you want to edit the existing one? Learners who took the old test keep their results.

toasts.minQuestion: There must be at least 1 question
toasts.minSection: There must be at least 1 section

stats.pendingDesc: Funds unlock automatically after the holding period

example.title: How income is calculated on one order

table.description: Click a month to see per-order detail

suspendedBanner.body: You can still view your profile but temporarily cannot publish courses or withdraw funds. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact an administrator.

wallet.source: Income source: commission split from learners purchasing courses.

errors.orderMin: Lesson order must be greater than 0

step1.title: Basic information
step1.subtitle: Fill in the title and price for your course

step2.title: Description & Category
step2.subtitle: Help learners understand your course
step2.descPlaceholder: Detailed description: audience, key content, outcomes...

step3.title: Image & Confirm
step3.subtitle: Add a thumbnail and review the information
step3.draftNotice: The course will be in DRAFT status after creation. You can add lessons and tests, then submit it for admin review.

toasts.imageType: Only JPEG, PNG, WEBP, GIF are accepted

courseDetail.previewTitle: View the course from a learner's perspective
courseDetail.draftCleared: Draft cleared, reverted to original data

checklist.thumbnailHint: Upload a thumbnail in the "Update" tab
checklist.descriptionHint: Briefly describe the goals & content of the course
checklist.levelHint: A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, or C2
checklist.lessonContent: At least 1 lesson has content (video or test)
checklist.lessonContentHint: Upload a video or attach a quiz to a lesson

courseDetail.descriptionEmpty: No description yet. Add one in the "Update" tab.
courseDetail.ratingsEmptyDesc: Ratings will appear when learners complete the course.

rejection.title: Course was rejected in review
rejection.completeBelow: Complete the items below then resubmit

pending.title: Awaiting admin review
pending.body: The course is in the review queue. It usually takes 1–3 business days. You'll be notified as soon as there's a result.
pending.delayed: Past the usual timeframe. If urgent, you can contact the admin via the support page.
pending.cancelHint: While waiting, you can cancel the submission and keep editing in the “Update” tab (revert status to Draft).

checklist.title: Ready to submit for review?
checklist.ready: All conditions met. Press "Submit for review" for the admin to review the course.

confirm.title: Confirm submission for review
confirm.description: After submitting, the admin will review it. You can still cancel and revert to Draft if needed.

transition.qualityFlagCleared: Admin removed the flag – course meets requirements

toasts.imageType: Only JPG, PNG, WebP are accepted.

metadataTab.title: Update course
metadataTab.subtitle: Edit course information and status
metadataTab.priceWarning: Price changes only apply to learners who buy after saving. Existing buyers are not refunded / charged the difference.
metadataTab.statusChange: Will change to {{status}} when you save.

withdrawalModal.title: Withdrawal request
withdrawalModal.lead: Admin usually approves within 24 business hours. Funds arrive at your bank in 1–3 business days.
withdrawalModal.bankSearchPlaceholder: Search by bank name or code...
withdrawalModal.autofillHint: Auto-filled from your last withdrawal ({{bank}}). You can edit if needed.
withdrawalModal.confirmLead: Double-check the details — admin transfers manually, a single wrong digit and the money won't arrive.

errors.bankDetails: Check the bank details again (account number must be 6–20 digits)

toasts.createdWithId: Withdrawal request #WR-{{id}} created — awaiting admin approval

empty.noneHint: Once you withdraw, history will show up here.
empty.filteredHint: Change the filter to see other requests.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel withdrawal request?
cancelDialog.bodyHtml: Funds will return to Available balance immediately. You can submit a new withdrawal request afterward.

proofDialog.title: Transfer receipt
proofDialog.lead: Click "Open image in new tab" to download (right click → Save image).

card.rejectionNote: Funds have been returned to your available balance. You can edit and resubmit.
card.stale: Pending more than 48 hours. If urgent,
card.retriedFrom: This is a retry of rejected request #WR-{{id}}.

timeline.rejected: Admin rejected — funds returned to balance
timeline.cancelled: You cancelled — funds returned to balance

support.subject: [Withdrawal #WR-{{id}}] Need support
support.body: Withdrawal request #WR-{{id}} ({{amount}}) has been pending since {{date}}.

toasts.cancelled: Withdrawal cancelled — funds returned to available balance

addQuizLesson.title: Add a test to this module
addQuizLesson.lead: Pick one test from your library. Create a new one on the My tests page if you don't have one yet.
addQuizLesson.finalBadgeTitle: This is a FINAL test — typically used for the end-of-course slot
addQuizLesson.nextOrderHint: The new test lesson will be inserted at position {{order}} in the module.

empty.noneCreated: You don't have any tests yet. Open "My tests" to create one first.

createCourseDialog.title: Create a new course
createCourseDialog.lead: Fill in the details to create a new course. It will be saved as DRAFT after creation.

errors.priceInvalid: Price must be a non-negative number
errors.imageTypeInvalid: Only image files are accepted (JPEG, PNG, WEBP, GIF)

createLessonDialog.title: Create a new lesson
createLessonDialog.lead: Fill in the details to create a new lesson for this course.
createLessonDialog.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Lesson 1: Introduction to IELTS Writing
createLessonDialog.nextOrderHint: The next lesson will use order: {{order}}.
createLessonDialog.uploadHint: Supports MP4, MPEG, MOV, AVI, WEBM (max 100MB)

errors.orderInvalid: Lesson order must be greater than 0
errors.videoTypeInvalid: Only video files are accepted (MP4, MPEG, MOV, AVI, WEBM)

editProfile.title: Edit instructor profile
editProfile.lead: Update your expertise and certifications. You can remove old images or upload new ones.
editProfile.uploadHint: JPG/PNG/WebP, max 5MB per file. Up to 10 images total (existing + new).

errors.fileTooLarge: Some files are too large (>5MB) and were skipped.
errors.maxImages: You can upload at most 10 certificate images (existing + new).
errors.atLeastOneCert: You must have at least 1 certificate.
errors.atLeastOneExpertise: You must have at least 1 expertise.

importFile.title: Import questions from file
importFile.description: Supports PDF (text) and DOCX. Scanned PDFs, image-based questions, and complex tables are NOT supported.
importFile.uploadPrompt: Click to select a .pdf or .docx file
importFile.manualKeyMissing: {{count}} questions still missing an answer — you can edit them later in the form.

finalTestTab.title: Final exam
finalTestTab.confirmDeleteDesc: You are about to delete "{{title}}". This action cannot be undone. All questions will be permanently deleted, and the course will no longer have a final exam.
finalTestTab.emptyDescription: The final exam evaluates the learner's outcome. Learners must complete all lessons before taking the test.
finalTestTab.linkExistingDesc: Use a test you previously created in My tests.
finalTestTab.createNewDesc: Open the test editor. The new test will be linked to this course after saving.
finalTestTab.pickerTitle: Pick a test to use as Final Test
finalTestTab.pickerDesc: Link an existing test from "My tests" as the final exam.
finalTestTab.pickerEmpty: You don't have any tests yet. Close this dialog and click "Create a new test".

courseModulesTab.noLessons: No lessons in this module yet
courseModulesTab.emptyDescription: Create a module to organize lessons by topic.
courseModulesTab.confirmDeleteDesc: You are about to delete the module "{{title}}". Lessons inside will be moved to unassigned lessons; they will not be lost.
courseModulesTab.toastReorderLessonsFailed: Failed to reorder lessons. Changes reverted.
courseModulesTab.toastReorderModulesFailed: Failed to reorder modules. Changes reverted.

sellerComments.title: Learner comments
sellerComments.subtitle: Reply quickly, remove inappropriate comments, and monitor engagement.
sellerComments.emptyAllHint: When learners start commenting on your courses, they will appear here.
sellerComments.loadError: Unable to load comments. Please try again later.
sellerComments.deleteDesc: The content will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered. If this is a valid question, consider replying instead.

lessonDetail.noMaterials: No materials yet. Click "Add link" to start.
lessonDetail.videoUrlHint: Paste a video link from AWS S3, YouTube, or another source.
lessonDetail.dropPrompt: Drag-drop or click to upload a video
lessonDetail.dropHint: Supports MP4, MPEG, MOV, AVI, WEBM (up to 100MB)
lessonDetail.oldVideoNotice: Old video: {{url}} — will be replaced when you upload a new file.
lessonDetail.submitHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line.
lessonDetail.confirmDeleteLessonLine1: You are about to delete the lesson "{{title}}".
lessonDetail.confirmDeleteLessonLine2: All related videos, comments, and learning progress will be permanently deleted — this cannot be undone.
lessonDetail.confirmDeleteLessonActiveWarn: The course is ACTIVE; learners who already purchased will no longer see this lesson.
lessonDetail.confirmDeleteCommentDesc: The content will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
lessonDetail.toastInvalidVideoFormat: Invalid format. Supported: MP4, MPEG, MOV, AVI, WEBM
